title: Valladolid, Castile and León — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Valladolid, Castile and León: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Valladolid is a city in Castile and León with a population of 300,000. A historic Castilian city with a magnificent Plaza Mayor, excellent wine region, and some of Spain’s most affordable housing.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
